title: Erie Indemnity to host first quarter 2023 pre-recorded conference call and webcast
text: ERIE, Pa. , April 11, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Erie Indemnity Company (NASDAQ: ERIE) will host a pre-recorded audio webcast with the financial community providing financial results for the first quarter Friday, April 28 th, at 10 a.m. Eastern Time.
